name: research
description: v4.0.0 - Intent-to-paper proposition-first R&D workflow with scoping, EDA, proposition workspace ownership, hypothesis plans, independent reviews, result analysis, and quant research support.

interface.longDescription: v4.0.0 - Agent-driven R&D skills for moving from intent through intake, uncertain-outcome gating, scoping literature, material acquisition, EDA, project observations, proposition workspace creation, hypothesis plans, evidence, result analysis, claims, and proposition-level research papers. creating-propositions owns proposition generation and proposition state files under propositions/Pxxx_slug/ with the unified states open, supported, unrealized-condition, under-specified, contradicted, split-needed, split, parked, and closed. research orchestrates the workflow, generated project layout, derived hypotheses, plans, plan review, execution artifacts, result analysis, claim records, decision ledgers, and paper creation at propositions/Pxxx_slug/paper.md when a proposition reaches supported or contradicted. The canonical layout includes intake.md, literature/scoping.md, literature/papers.md, literature/positioning.md, data/raw, data/processed, data/eda, observations.md, lib/{data,eval,viz,utils,tests}, and propositions/. Old top-level plans, top-level experiment runs, literature/differentiation.md, and per-hypothesis reports are not compatibility paths. research-plan-review remains the plan-path-only pre-execution review skill. research-result-analysis remains the plan-path-only post-execution why-analysis skill. quant-research remains the domain extension for time-series validation, leakage checks, multiple-testing risk, and robustness.
defaultPrompt: Start this R&D project from intent through intake and scoping
Create proposition workspaces from these observations
Design a hypothesis plan under this proposition
Draft a proposition-level research paper from this resolved proposition
